title: Implement Pixoo V2 upload and ID methods
description: Implement get_http_gif_id, reset_http_gif_id, upload_sequence(mode=frame_by_frame|command_list, chunk_size=40) and refactor push/push_buffer through V2 transport.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing Pixoo V2 protocol methods now: HTTP GIF ID lifecycle + sequence upload modes (frame_by_frame and command_list).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented V2 Pixoo methods: , ,  (frame_by_frame + command_list chunking), and routed / through native sequence upload.
